summary: Iteration 199: Compliance Docs Widget & Fascicolo Aziendale - All features working correctly. Backend 21/21 tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with dashboard widget, commessa compliance banner, and download buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/dashboard/compliance-docs returns correct structure: documenti, allegati_pos, riepilogo, alert_30gg, commesse_compliance
Riepilogo shows totale_globali=5, caricati_globali=3, mancanti=2 (White List, Patente a Crediti)
Commesse compliance shows pct_conforme (60% for Loiano) with problemi list
GET /api/dashboard/fascicolo-aziendale returns valid ZIP with INFO.txt and organized folders
GET /api/dashboard/commessa-compliance/{commessa_id} returns conforme=false, bloccanti=['White List: mancante', 'Patente a Crediti: mancante']
Each check has tipo, label, esito (ok/mancante/scaduto/insufficiente/no_scadenza), messaggio
Frontend ComplianceDocsWidget shows document pills with status colors, alert badge '2 problemi', commesse progress bars
Frontend CommessaComplianceBanner shows red warning with all 5 checks and 'Correggi documenti' button
Pacco Documenti button works - returns valid PDF
Fascicolo download button works - returns valid ZIP
Verbale Posa PDF logo integration implemented at lines 332-340 in verbale_posa.py - checks both settings and company_settings collections
seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: DURC with scadenza 2026-08-15, Visura Camerale, DVR uploaded. White List and Patente a Crediti missing (as expected for compliance testing).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 199 verified Compliance Docs Widget & Fascicolo Aziendale features. Key findings: (1) Dashboard widget 'Conformita Documentale' shows 5 document pills with status colors, '2 problemi' alert badge, and 6 commesse with progress bars (60% for Loiano). (2) Fascicolo download button returns valid ZIP with INFO.txt and organized folders. (3) CommessaHub page shows red compliance warning banner with 5 checks (DURC ok, Visura no_scadenza, White List mancante, Patente mancante, DVR no_scadenza). (4) 'Correggi documenti' button navigates to settings. (5) Pacco Documenti button returns valid PDF. (6) Verbale Posa PDF logo integration checks both settings and company_settings collections for logo_url.
